name: Honey Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 large Egg; Beaten With A Little Water For Glazing
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour, spices, sugar, and baking powder together, blending well.
2. Add the eggs, honey, and orange peel to make a soft dough.
3. On a floured work surface, roll out the dough to about 1/2-inch thick.
4. Cut into shapes with cookie cutters and place on a lightly greased or non-stick cookie sheet.
5. Brush each cookie with egg wash glaze.
6. Place half of an almond in the top center of each cookie and sprinkle with sugar crystals.
7. Bake in a preheated 350 Degree F. oven until done, about 15 minutes.
8. Cool on wire racks and store in airtight tins.
